name: Notebook Entry Creator
description: Can create new notebook entries for assigned templates

name: Sample Receiver
description: Can receive and register incoming samples

name: Sample Processor
description: Can perform initial sample processing and preparation

name: Aliquoting Technician
description: Can create aliquots and child samples

name: QC Technician
description: Can perform quality control checks on samples

name: Storage Manager
description: Can manage storage locations and retrieve samples

name: Test Executor
description: Can execute tests and capture raw data

name: Analyst
description: Can perform data analysis on test results

name: Results Entry and Validator
description: Can enter and compile test results

name: Archivist
description: Can archive samples and manage long-term storage

name: Disposal Officer
description: Can dispose of samples following protocols

name: Report Generator
description: Can generate reports and export data
